summary: Completed testing of PT Rahaza ERP Phase 18B (Andon Panel), 18C (TV Mode), and 18D (SOP Inline) features. Backend APIs are functional, TV Mode works perfectly, but frontend routing issues prevent full UI testing of authenticated features.

data_dependency_issues.issue: Missing sample data for comprehensive testing
data_dependency_issues.details: No employees, models, or processes available for creating test Andon events and SOPs

critical_bugs.issue: Authenticated routes (/operator, production portal) show login page instead of components
critical_bugs.details: JavaScript error 'You need to enable JavaScript to run this app' appears on authenticated routes
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to Andon Panel and SOP management UI

working_features.details: ShopFloorTV component loads perfectly with KPI display, clock, and empty state handling
Authentication with admin@garment.com / Admin@123 works, portal selector displays correctly

passed_tests: Portal selector displays all 5 portals (Management, Production, Warehouse, Finance, HR)
Phase 18B - Andon settings GET/PUT endpoints work
Phase 18C - TV Mode floor data endpoint works (no auth required)
Phase 18C - TV Mode alerts endpoint works (no auth required)
Phase 18C - ShopFloorTV UI component fully functional
All basic endpoints (employees, models, processes, lines) work
TV Mode displays correctly with KPI strip, clock, and empty state
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React app routing issues for authenticated routes. The main issue is that routes like /operator and production portal navigation show 'You need to enable JavaScript to run this app' instead of loading the React components. This prevents testing of Andon Panel UI and SOP management features. Also consider adding sample data (employees, models, processes) for more comprehensive testing.

success_percentage.backend: 85% - Core APIs work, missing sample data limits full testing
success_percentage.frontend: 40% - TV Mode works perfectly, but authenticated routes have critical routing issues
